expected.notes: Work locations match exactly between I-20 and employment letter, so cpt_location_mismatch must not fire despite all other CPT context being present.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'cpt_location_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.work_location mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
